name: mypka-slack-listener
description: myPKA Slack Expansion — Socket Mode listener. Inbound messages -> Team Inbox/slack-incoming/. Outbound queue -> Slack Web API (chat.postMessage with unfurl_links/media false).
//deps: Direct deps are EXACT-pinned (no caret) — the only two are the official Slack SDKs. The committed package-lock.json pins the full transitive tree; install with `npm ci` (see scripts/install.sh) so the lock is authoritative. Refresh + npm-audit the lockfile at every pack release per the release checklist.
